title: Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri
tagline: Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Our Lady of Fatima Shrine is a Catholic church in Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, India, It also serves as the primary parish church for the Krishnagiri region.
overview.description: The Our Lady of Fatima Shrine is a Catholic church in Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, India, It also serves as the primary parish church for the Krishnagiri region. The construction of this church took place in 1972, primarily due to the inadequate space available at the existing Ignatius Church, situated in Oldpet, Krishnagiri. Notably, the Fatima Mary statue housed within the church originates from Fátima, Portugal. An annual feast celebrated on the Sunday after 13 July has garnered significant renown within the town.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri taluk
topPlaces.description: Krishnagiri Taluk is a taluk of Krishnagiri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the municipal town of Krishnagiri which is about 255 km from Chennai, state capital.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri
topPlaces.description: Krishnagiri (IPA: [kiɾɯʂɳaɡiɾi]) is a town in the state of Tamil Nadu, India, and it serves as the administrative headquarters of Krishnagiri District formed in 2004. It is located at the bottom of Krishnadevaraya Hills, and the city is fully surrounded by hill rocks.

topPlaces.name: Kathujuganapalli
topPlaces.description: Kattiganapalli is a census town in Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.It is suburb of Krishnagiri city.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri division
topPlaces.description: Krishnagiri division is a revenue division in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri block
topPlaces.description: The Krishnagiri block is a revenue block in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 30 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri Dam
topPlaces.description: The Krishnagiri Dam is a dam that spans the Thenpennai River by the village of Dhuduganahalli, located in the Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. The Krishnagiri Dam is also known as Krishnagiri Reservoir Project (KRP) Dam.

topPlaces.name: St. Antony's Church, Sundampatti
topPlaces.description: St. Antony Church, Sundampatti is a Catholic church in Sundampatti village, Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Samanthamalai
topPlaces.description: Samanthamalai (Samantha= Kula and Malai=Peak) is a panchayat in Veppanapalli Taluk in Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place were part of Adi Karnataka (Right Hand) or Samanta Kula have settled.

items.note: Krishnagiri Taluk is a taluk of Krishnagiri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the municipal town of Krishnagiri which is about 255 km from Chennai, state capital.

Krishnagiri (IPA: [kiɾɯʂɳaɡiɾi]) is a town in the state of Tamil Nadu, India, and it serves as the administrative headquarters of Krishnagiri District formed in 2004. It is located at the bottom of Krishnadevaraya Hills, and the city is fully surrounded by hill rocks.
Kattiganapalli is a census town in Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.It is suburb of Krishnagiri city.
Krishnagiri division is a revenue division in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India.
The Krishnagiri block is a revenue block in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 30 panchayat villages.

The Krishnagiri Dam is a dam that spans the Thenpennai River by the village of Dhuduganahalli, located in the Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. The Krishnagiri Dam is also known as Krishnagiri Reservoir Project (KRP) Dam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (93 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Fatima Church, Krishnagiri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Krishnagiri taluk, Krishnagiri, Kathujuganapalli, Krishnagiri division, Krishnagiri block.
